TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: tada kamu nu Miwcu u Miwyi, nu Miwyew-yicu a nu Miwyian. nasisulit ku Miwyi, nika malawpes tu. aydaay nu Cunkuo a Miwcu, niyalaan tu sasulitan namakayda i Cunkuo nakamuan a kaydaan itini i caysiw-limnem a mihcaan caysep a bulat nu Cunkuo satabakiay nu nakamuan a kitidaan tu Cunkuo satabakiay nu tuluay a Miwyian tu natanga han sisulit tu nakamuan, u tunem a sasulitan tu Latingu ku sangihaan tu tadakamu, yunmu atu ngalngal. . caay namin kalecad ku nika utiihay nu sasakamuen tu Miwyi, sadayumen ku nakamuan, masasulalitu tu tada kamun nu layak a kitidaan, tadakamu sinikadayuman tu atu mapatadu nu layak a nakamuan tada micidek tu. .
S.PHON: tada kamu nu miw ¶u u miwji, nu miwj…ôw-ji ¶u a nu miwjian. nasisur~…ĺit ku miwji, nika mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. ajdaaj nu ¶unkuo a miw ¶u, nijar~…ĺaan tu sasur~…ĺitan namakajda i ¶unkuo nakamuan a kajdaan itini i ¶ajsiw-r~…ĺimn…ôm a mińß ¶aan ¶ajs…ôp a bur~…ĺat nu ¶unkuo satabakiaj nu nakamuan a kitidaan tu ¶unkuo satabakiaj nu tur~…ĺuaj a miwjian tu nataŇča ńßan sisur~…ĺit tu nakamuan, u tun…ôm a sasur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺatiŇču ku saŇčińßaan tu tadakamu, junmu atu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ. . ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nika utiińßaj nu sasakamu…ôn tu miwji, sadajum…ôn ku nakamuan, masasur~…ĺar~…ĺitu tu tada kamun nu r~…ĺajak a kitidaan, tadakamu sinikadajuman tu atu mapatadu nu r~…ĺajak a nakamuan tada mi ¶id…ôk tu. .
S.FORM: tada kamu nu Miwcu u Miwyi, nu Miwyew-yicu a nu Miwyian. nasisulit ku Miwyi, nika malawpes tu. aydaay nu Cunkuo a Miwcu, niyalaan tu sasulitan namakayda i Cunkuo nakamuan a kaydaan itini i caysiw-limnem a mihcaan caysep a bulat nu Cunkuo satabakiay nu nakamuan a kitidaan tu Cunkuo satabakiay nu tuluay a Miwyian tu natanga han sisulit tu nakamuan, u tunem a sasulitan tu Latingu ku sangihaan tu tadakamu, yunmu atu ngalngal. . caay namin kalecad ku nika utiihay nu sasakamuen tu Miwyi, sadayumen ku nakamuan, masasulalitu tu tada kamun nu layak a kitidaan, tadakamu sinikadayuman tu atu mapatadu nu layak a nakamuan tada micidek tu. .
S.PHON: tada kamu nu miw ¶u u miwji, nu miwj…ôw-ji ¶u a nu miwjian. nasisur~…ĺit ku miwji, nika mar~…ĺawp…ôs tu. ajdaaj nu ¶unkuo a miw ¶u, nijar~…ĺaan tu sasur~…ĺitan namakajda i ¶unkuo nakamuan a kajdaan itini i ¶ajsiw-r~…ĺimn…ôm a mińß ¶aan ¶ajs…ôp a bur~…ĺat nu ¶unkuo satabakiaj nu nakamuan a kitidaan tu ¶unkuo satabakiaj nu tur~…ĺuaj a miwjian tu nataŇča ńßan sisur~…ĺit tu nakamuan, u tun…ôm a sasur~…ĺitan tu r~…ĺatiŇču ku saŇčińßaan tu tadakamu, junmu atu Ňčar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ. . ¶aaj namin kar~…ĺ…ô ¶ad ku nika utiińßaj nu sasakamu…ôn tu miwji, sadajum…ôn ku nakamuan, masasur~…ĺar~…ĺitu tu tada kamun nu r~…ĺajak a kitidaan, tadakamu sinikadajuman tu atu mapatadu nu r~…ĺajak a nakamuan tada mi ¶id…ôk tu. .
